question.label: Next two weeks
question.name: What would you like to have changed by our next check-in?
question.description: Closes on a specific commitment for the next cycle without opening a new topic.

answer: I will start by writing one explicit priority rule I will use when time pressure hits this month.

assessment.note: Names a specific behavioural change for the next month — a clear positive growth commitment.

history.answer_excerpt: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.

I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.

I would like to grow faster in concept rationale, not just execution speed.
A tighter loop on one skill at a time would help me improve.
If we align on concrete criteria, I can work against them confidently.
